architecture.summary: All changes are SKILL.md markdown files and docs. No new runtime code, services, or components. Modifications to existing skill definitions (do, grill, tdd-cycle) plus one new debug SKILL.md. Architecture: SpecWeave plugin skill system (markdown-based instructions parsed by AI agents).

integrations.summary: N/A - No external service integrations. All changes are internal SpecWeave skill definitions (markdown). Config opt-in via quality.perTaskReview in config.json (already-existing config pattern).

ui-ux.summary: N/A - No UI changes. Skills are AI agent instructions (markdown). User interaction is via existing CLI commands (/sw:do, /sw:grill, /sw:debug).

performance.summary: N/A - No runtime code. Per-task review gates add 2 subagent calls per task (context cost, not compute). Opt-in via config flag.

security.summary: N/A - No auth, data handling, or secrets. Markdown skill definitions only.

edge-cases.summary: Key edge cases: (1) team-lead active = skip per-task gates to avoid conflict, (2) no test block on task = fallback to project test command, (3) grill new Phase 0 must not break existing Phase 1-3 flow, (4) debug skill escalation after 3 failed fixes, (5) config flag missing = default off for per-task review.
